## Self-check

- [ ] Keep Karpathy kernel (Wiki / double-links / ingest-query-lint loop)
- [ ] Update details first, then sync SPEC
- [ ] Strong anonymization applied (use entity aliases; no real names/handles)
- [ ] No personally identifiable clues (name/account/site/social IDs)
- [ ] Terminology and metric scope are consistent
- [ ] Hook/lint suggestions are recommendations, not hard one-size-fits-all rules
